inputs.label: Nominal Bolt Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The nominal diameter of the bolt's thread.

inputs.label: Thread Pitch
inputs.businessContext: The distance between adjacent thread crests. For standard coarse threads, refer to ISO 724.

inputs.label: Material Yield Strength
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of the bolt material (e.g., 640 MPa for Grade 8.8).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Design safety factor to ensure the bolt remains below yield under service loads.

inputs.label: Nut Factor (K)
inputs.businessContext: Empirical factor accounting for thread friction and underhead friction. Typical dry steel: 0.2.
